sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 45610 — CONSTANTINE X, 1059-1067. AV Histamenon Nomisma (4.39 gms), Constantinople Mint, ca. 1065-1067. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 2/5. Bent.
S-1848. Obverse: Christ Pantokrator seated facing on throne;
sales.description:
CONSTANTINE X, 1059-1067. AV Histamenon Nomisma (4.39 gms), Constantinople Mint, ca. 1065-1067. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 2/5. Bent.
S-1848. Obverse: Christ Pantokrator seated facing on throne; Reverse: Constantine standing facing on dais, holding globus cruciger, being crowned by the Theotokos.

Estimate: 400 - 600...
